mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.dy_id AS "dy.id", a.to AS "to.id", a.title AS "title", a.commid AS "commid", a.likes AS "likes", a.level AS "level", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.lianghao AS "u.lianghao", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
dy.info AS "dy.info",
`to`.nickname AS "to.nickname", `to`.icon AS "to.icon", `to`.sex AS "to.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_dy dy ON dy.id = a.dy_id LEFT JOIN t_member `to` ON `to`.id = a.to
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dy_comm( id, uid, dy_id, `to`, title, commid, likes, `level`, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{dy.id}, #{to.id}, #{title}, #{commid}, #{likes}, #{level}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_dy_comm SET uid = #{u.id}, dy_id = #{dy.id}, `to` = #{to.id}, title = #{title}, commid = #{commid}, likes = #{likes}, `level` = #{level}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
